shopping.response:
Shopping on your mind? 🛒

**Food shopping guidance:**
• 🛒 What to buy at the market for diabetes
• ✅ How to read nutrition labels

**Market tips for diabetics:**
• Buy whole grains (ofada rice, oats)
• Stock up on vegetables (okra, ewedu, ugwu)
• Choose lean proteins (fish, chicken, beans)
• Avoid processed foods

Would you like a healthy shopping list for diabetes management? 📝

healthBridgeQuestions.description: Questions that seem off-topic but have health/nutrition answers

energy.response:
Feeling tired? This could be blood sugar related! 📊

**Nutrition factors that affect energy:**
• Blood sugar spikes and crashes
• Skipping meals
• Dehydration
• Nutrient deficiencies

**Diabetes-specific tips:**
• Eat regular, balanced meals
• Choose low-GI foods for sustained energy
• Stay hydrated
• Include protein with every meal

Want me to suggest energy-boosting meals that won't spike your blood sugar?

stress.response:
Stress can affect blood sugar levels! 😟➡️📊

**The stress-diabetes connection:**
• Stress hormones raise blood sugar
• Stress eating can lead to poor choices
• Poor sleep affects glucose control

**Nutrition strategies for stress:**
• Magnesium-rich foods (dark leafy greens)
• Omega-3s (fish, nuts)
• Complex carbs for stable mood
• Avoid caffeine and sugar

Would you like meal suggestions that help manage stress while controlling blood sugar?

sleep.response:
Sleep troubles? This connects to diabetes management! 😴

**Sleep and blood sugar:**
• Poor sleep increases insulin resistance
• Blood sugar affects sleep quality
• Late eating disrupts sleep

**Nutrition tips for better sleep:**
• Don't eat within 2-3 hours of bedtime
• Avoid caffeine after 2pm
• Dinner should be light and low-carb
• Try: warm milk, chamomile tea, turkey

Want dinner suggestions that promote better sleep?
